headline: Anthropic 'Mythos' AI model leak reveals 'step change' in capabilities
summary: Anthropic confirmed testing a powerful new AI model called 'Mythos' after an accidental data leak revealed its existence, calling it a 'step change' in performance capabilities.

headline: 12 AI models launched in one week as 'model avalanche' hits developers
summary: Between March 10-16, 2026, six major AI companies including OpenAI, Google, xAI, Anthropic, Mistral, and Cursor launched twelve distinct models, compressing developer selection cycles.

headline: Claude's popularity surge forces Anthropic to throttle usage during peak hours
summary: Anthropic is implementing usage caps and throttling during peak hours due to mainstream interest surge following CEO Dario Amodei's refusal to grant Pentagon unfettered AI access.

headline: ARC-AGI-3 launches with $2M prize as frontier models score under 1%
summary: The new ARC-AGI-3 benchmark launched with a $2 million prize pool, with every frontier AI model scoring under 1%, highlighting the challenge of abstract reasoning.

headline: White House proposes National AI Framework to curb conflicting state laws
summary: The White House unveiled a comprehensive National Policy Framework for Artificial Intelligence to establish a unified federal approach and prevent conflicting state regulations.

headline: UN convenes inaugural meeting of Independent International Scientific Panel on AI
summary: The United Nations held the first meeting of a 40-member expert panel established under the Global Digital Compact to produce annual evidence-based reports on AI's societal impact.

headline: Apple hires ex-Google executive to head AI marketing amid Siri improvement push
summary: Apple has hired a former Google executive to lead AI marketing as the company intensifies efforts to improve Siri and compete in the generative AI space.

headline: AI safety protestors march from Anthropic to OpenAI to xAI demanding pause commitment
summary: Nearly 200 people participated in the largest AI safety protest in US history, marching between major AI labs with one demand: commit to pausing development if competitors do too.

headline: Clarivate reveals AI50: ranking organizations leading AI invention
summary: Clarivate announced the AI50, a new data-driven benchmark identifying organizations demonstrating exceptional leadership in high-impact artificial intelligence inventions.
